title: Risk reports need to address deployment-time spread of misalignment
summary: Risk reports need to address deployment-time spread of misalignment
whyItMatters: Risk reports commonly use pre-deployment alignment assessments to measure misalignment risk from an internally deployed AI. However, an AI that genuinely starts out with largely benign motivations can develop widespread dangerous motivations during deployment. I think this is the most plausible route to consistent adversarial misalignment in the near future…
